title: Computational artifact for: The Richelot isogeny graph as a Brandt matrix
description: Scripts, assembled Brandt matrices, and machine-checkable certificates reproducing all computations in the paper 'The Richelot isogeny graph as a Brandt matrix: a global eigenvalue correspondence and a structural trace formula' (eight matrices B_2(2) for 11<=p<=37, the full 128x128 computation at p=61, the spectral catalogue, the sign law, the trace identity, the type numbers, and the closed-form predictions).

creators.name: Dang, Hung T.
creators.affiliation: Department of Mathematics, University of Phuong Dong, Hanoi, Vietnam
